error.signature: [WARN] New publisher discovered on topic '/sensor_data', offering incompatible QoS

verdict.summary: Publisher and subscriber have mismatched QoS profiles. Messages are silently dropped with no error besides this warning.

dead_ends.action: Set both sides to RELIABLE QoS unconditionally
dead_ends.why_fails: Sensor drivers often only offer BEST_EFFORT; forcing RELIABLE on subscriber causes zero messages with no further error

dead_ends.action: Ignore the warning assuming messages still arrive
dead_ends.why_fails: With incompatible QoS the DDS layer drops ALL messages; the warning is not cosmetic

dead_ends.action: Change DDS middleware hoping it fixes QoS
dead_ends.why_fails: QoS incompatibility is DDS-standard behavior, not vendor-specific; switching RMW does not help

workarounds.action: Match subscriber QoS to publisher using SensorDataQoS or qos_profile_sensor_data
workarounds.how: from rclpy.qos import qos_profile_sensor_data; self.create_subscription(Msg, topic, cb, qos_profile_sensor_data)

workarounds.action: Use ros2 topic info -v to check offered and requested QoS
Set QoS reliability to BEST_EFFORT for high-frequency sensor topics
